paths:
{{#each convention_paths}}
  - "{{this}}"
{{/each}}
default_severity: warning

# Convention Rules
<!-- Generated by Clauding Thought /init -- project-specific code conventions -->
<!-- Convention rules are capped at 'warning' severity -- they never BLOCK -->

## Naming
<!-- severity: warning -->

<!-- Derived from manifest.conventions.naming -->

| Element       | Convention       | Example              |
|---------------|------------------|----------------------|
| Files         | `{{file_case}}`  | `{{file_example}}`   |
| Classes       | `{{class_case}}` | `{{class_example}}`  |
| Methods       | `{{method_case}}`| `{{method_example}}` |
| DB columns    | `{{column_case}}`| `{{column_example}}` |
| Routes        | `{{route_case}}` | `{{route_example}}`  |

## Validation
<!-- severity: warning -->

- Style: `{{validation_style}}`
- Example:
```{{language}}
{{validation_example}}
```

## Model Conventions
<!-- severity: warning -->

- Casts defined as: `{{model_casts}}` (method or property)
- Required traits for scoped models: `{{tenancy_trait}}`
- Enum labels return: `{{enum_labels}}` (translation-key or hardcoded)

## Translations
<!-- severity: warning -->

<!-- Derived from manifest.conventions.translation -->

- System: `{{translation_system}}`
- Locales: `{{locales}}`
- All locales required: `{{all_locales_required}}`
- When adding UI text, add keys to ALL locale files

## Formatting
<!-- severity: info -->

- Tool: `{{formatting_tool}}`
- Command: `{{formatting_command}}`
- Run before finalizing changes

## Testing
<!-- severity: warning -->

- Test data: `{{test_data}}` (factory, manual, fixture)
- Test location: `{{test_directory}}`
- Every change must have tests

## Frontend
<!-- severity: warning -->

<!-- Omit if no frontend -->

- Component framework: `{{frontend}}`
- Navigation: `{{navigation_approach}}`
- Data fetching: `{{data_fetching}}`
- No direct HTTP calls from components -- use the established pattern

## Custom Conventions
